name: Multiple Conditional Validations (allOf)
summary: Multiple if/then blocks wrapped in `allOf` for forms with several conditional required fields
whenToUse: Forms with two or more separate conditional validation rules
Complex government forms where different sections become required based on different triggers
notes: Wrap multiple if/then blocks in `allOf` at the root level of the data schema
You can add as many conditional validation blocks as needed inside `allOf`
Each `if/then` is independent — they don't interfere with each other
You can conditionally specify ANY JSON Schema validation: required, pattern, minLength, format, etc.
Be sure to pair each conditional validation with a matching SHOW/HIDE rule in the UI schema
